titleStmt.title: SII 42.19: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 19. (A.R. No. B. 26 of 1953-54.) Ēlūru, Eluru Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On pillar No. 1 in the compound of the Taluk Office.
The record is dated in Śaka 1123 (Chronogram: guṇ-ārka-dvijapati), Nakra (Makara)saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1201, December 28.

Written in Sanskrit verse, the inscription records a gift of a lamp to god Bhīmēśvara by Mallabhūpāla, son of Chōḍa Malla and Sōmāṁbā and grandson of (name lost) and lord of Peḍakallu. The king is said to belong to the Kāśyapa-gōtra which is known from the Telugu-Chōḷa records.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
prōnmadyadripu darppadalana prō
dvṛtta kaṁṭhīravaḥ . varādhinātha
makuṭa prōttuṁgga puṁjā(ja)
raṁjita pādapaṁkkajayugaḥ prakhyā
takīrttipriyaḥ . tatpautraḥ pratipakṣa
bhūpavipina prōdvṛtta dāvānalassa
ṁrājatpeḍakaṁṭidēśa nṛpatiḥ śrīcōḍamalla
prabhuḥ . tatpatnī patidēvatā vrataratā kru(pra)
tyakṣalakṣmīsatī sōmāṁbā jagadāṁbikā pa
dasarā(rō)jātārccanātatparā . tatputraḥ kṣi

tipōttamāṁga khacita prōttuṁgga rājanma
ṇirggaṇyaḥ puṇyaparōttama kṣitibhujāṁ lakṣmīsa
tīvallabhaḥ . Aṁrccannitya manaṁttamartthi vibudha
śraddhēya maṁddāravaddattē mallamahīpatirvvi
jayatē saṁvarddhamānōdayaṁ(ḥ) . sōmāṁbā
cōḍamalla kṣitipati tanayaḥ kāśyapaḥ
khyātagōtraḥ kṣōṇīdēvēśa rakṣāparama
tiramalō mallabhūpālavaryyaḥ . śrī śākā
bdē guṇārkka dvijapatigaṇitē nakra saṁkrāṁtti
tithyau prādādbhīmēśvarāya prakaṭita gu
ṇavāṁ(n?) dīpamācaṁdratāraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 42.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
